changedFiles.reason: Created the Work Item Contract skeleton.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: New public APIs must be documented.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: No public API was added; the provider-neutral protocol and adapter boundary are documented in the design spec.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not import internal modules from other features.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Investigation-only Work Item; no production module imports were changed.

intentAlignment.constraintsRespectEvidence: The design keeps hosted remote cleanup separate from local cleanup, preserves fail-closed recovery, and avoids provider assumptions in adopter projects.
intentAlignment.rationaleValidated: The investigation establishes an evidence-backed design before granting destructive automation permissions.

risk.detail: Provider adapter, credential, and evidence-sink decisions remain explicitly recorded for a separate coding Work Item; unknown or unobservable provider state must remain fail-closed.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Merged request triggers safe remote cleanup only after merge and required evidence checks
evidence: Provider-neutral design section and Option C safety requirements.
scenarioCoverage.reason: This Work Item is investigation-only; provider-specific adapter implementation belongs to a separate coding Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Developer-local branch is cleaned after remote merge without deleting an unmerged branch
evidence: Design separates hosted cleanup from local post-merge/sync cleanup and keeps manual fail-closed recovery.
scenarioCoverage.reason: This Work Item is investigation-only; local trigger implementation belongs to a separate coding Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Cleanup races with provider-side automatic branch deletion
evidence: PR41 idempotent remote deletion implementation and passing PR checks.

observedIssues.detail: PR #41 template-smoke initially failed because archived Summary verification contractHash values were stale after the final Contract amendment; updating all verification hashes made make check-ai-pr and Actions pass.
The PR41-merged main baseline has 721 tracked files; this Work Item adds one tracked design file, so the fixed trackedFiles bound was raised to 722 before implementation.

residualRisks.detail: Provider capability and evidence integration remain intentionally unresolved; unknown or unobservable provider state must remain fail-closed.

reviewReadiness.reason: All required verification passed; residual risk remains documented.
expectedReviewFocus: Confirm GitHub Actions remains a template-repository adapter example only and is never installed as a universal adopter requirement.
Confirm the fixed trackedFiles threshold of 722 matches the PR41-merged baseline plus this Work Item's tracked design artifact.
Confirm destructive remote cleanup remains disabled until provider-specific evidence and permissions are independently verified.

userCorrectionsCaptured: User clarified that GitHub Actions may be documented for the template repository, but adopter projects must not be hard-coded to GitHub because they may use GitLab.

userCorrectionSolidification.correction: Do not hard-code GitHub Actions into installed adopter projects.
userCorrectionSolidification.evidence: Design now defines provider-neutral CI/CD monitoring and requires an explicit provider adapter or manual fail-closed mode for adopters.

checkpointEvidence.detail: Recorded before updating the provider-neutral design and fixed governance threshold.
Recorded after design, adopter-provider boundary, baseline synchronization, and threshold updates were completed.

knownGaps: Provider-specific implementation, credentials, and evidence sink remain intentionally deferred to a separate coding Work Item.
overclaimPrevention: Do not report completion for checks or behavior that were not verified.
